evidence_note: Real-UAV LoRa/LoRaWAN public measurements for range, edge reliability, and aerial link variability; packet-capture LoRaWAN studies for low-rate and loss envelope.
Real-UAV 2.4 GHz IEEE 802.15.4 measurements for aerial edge loss and range collapse; XBee/802.15.4 studies for nominal rate and recovery.
Real-chipset BLE discovery/reconnect studies and RSSI-distance datasets; no public aerial BLE dataset was used.
K10 Wi-Fi bench measurements for service-time scale plus conservative short-range edge-loss assumptions; no public aerial Wi-Fi IoT dataset was used.
